faqs.question: How do I join the club?
faqs.answer: Just show up to any Thursday meeting! No formal membership required.

faqs.question: Do I need coding experience?
faqs.answer: Not at all! We welcome students from all majors interested in AI and business.

faqs.question: Are there membership fees?
faqs.answer: No membership fees. Events and workshops are free unless otherwise noted.
